notes: Evidence gathered for the three-idea comparative HTML packet. Market and pricing claims in the decks are dated and linked back to these sources where possible.

sources.name: Unity Asset Manager product page
sources.used_for: 3D asset management feature benchmark: RBAC, APIs, SDKs, Unity Version Control integration, VPC option, 3D previews, FBX/OBJ/AutoCAD/glTF support.

sources.name: Unity 2026 pricing changes
sources.used_for: Unity DevOps/Asset Manager storage and egress packaging context.

sources.name: VNTANA 3D Digital Asset Management
sources.used_for: 3D/CAD DAM competitive benchmark: CAD optimization, PLM/PIM/DAM/eCommerce connections, sales and aftermarket portals, role-based permissions, versioning.

sources.name: HOOPS Exchange Documentation
sources.used_for: CAD import/export SDK capability benchmark: exact geometry, model tree, metadata, CATIA/NX/Creo/SOLIDWORKS/Inventor/Solid Edge/JT/STEP/STL/IGES/Revit/IFC/DWG.

sources.name: Open CASCADE Technology FAQ
sources.used_for: MVP CAD kernel option: commercial applications can use OCCT without development license fees, runtime fees, or royalties, subject to LGPL obligations.

sources.name: Digital Asset Management market report
sources.used_for: 2026 DAM market sizing by application, including manufacturing at approximately $0.95B and global DAM software at approximately $4.77B.

sources.name: Bizzabo pricing
sources.used_for: Event platform pricing and sponsor portal benchmark: Event Experience OS starts at $17,999 per year, sponsor portal listed as premium add-on.

sources.name: Luma pricing
sources.used_for: RSVP/ticketing price anchor: free unlimited events/guests, Luma Plus $59/month annually, 5% platform fee on paid free plan, invite send add-ons.

sources.name: Partiful help center pricing
sources.used_for: Consumer/social event invite benchmark: core platform free, ticketing fee in beta.

sources.name: Splash pricing
sources.used_for: Event marketing platform benchmark: enterprise-style license roles, CRM sync, badge printing, brand management, custom templates.

sources.name: PQ Media experiential marketing forecast press release
sources.used_for: Experiential marketing and event sponsorship market context: global experiential marketing $116.14B in 2023, US experiential $52.80B in 2023, US event sponsorship $19.91B in 2023.

sources.name: Twilio US SMS pricing
sources.used_for: SMS unit cost model: US long-code SMS $0.0083 outbound/inbound plus carrier fees, phone number charges, short-code lease pricing.

sources.name: Twilio A2P 10DLC
sources.used_for: 10DLC compliance model: brand verification, campaign approval, phone-number association, restrictions, and approval timing.

sources.name: Subtext 2026 announcement
sources.used_for: SMS creator/media benchmark: Subtext reports 28M subscribers, 10B messages in 2025, 105% YoY revenue growth, churn below 1%.

sources.name: Community.com SMS marketing explainer
sources.used_for: Community.com positioning benchmark: conversational SMS, contact-based pricing, claimed open/CTR/engagement statistics.

sources.name: Apple Messages for Business guide
sources.used_for: iMessage/Apple Business messaging platform risk: cost depends on messaging service provider, business pays MSP, Apple privacy/contact-verification features.

sources.name: Message Central USA SMS guidelines
sources.used_for: SMS compliance model: TCPA consent, CTIA rules, 10DLC/TCR registration, opt-out, quiet hours, penalties.

sources.name: Messente RCS Business Messaging 2026 update
sources.used_for: RCS platform shift: carrier support, iOS 18 support, RCS user growth, business-message volume estimates.

sources.name: EZ Texting SMS statistics 2026
sources.used_for: US SMS marketing market context: Grand View Research estimate of $2.86B in 2023 and projected $9.96B by 2030.
